key_items: Bitcoin Has Dumped All of Its Gains Since Trump Was Reelected—And Then Some
Bitcoin price rebound wobbles as Israel defies Trump and hits Iran, sending oil back toward $100
Bad News For Bitcoin: Historical Lows Show The Bottom Actually Lies Below $30,000
reasoning: Bitcoin is facing significant near-term headwinds from geopolitical escalation (Israel-Iran tensions), a sharp 50%+ pullback from recent highs, and technical analysis suggesting potential further downside below $60,000 support. While some institutional adoption and mining cost support ($60K floor) provide fundamental grounding, the confluence of risk-off sentiment, legislative uncertainty on crypto regulation (CLARITY Act odds dropping), and historical cycle patterns pointing lower creates a challenging environment for swing traders over the next 1-7 days.
risks: Continued geopolitical escalation or broader macro risk-off rotation could trigger capitulation below $60,000 support and test $30,000 historical lows, while regulatory disappointment could accelerate institutional outflows.
